brief: Trump's prime-time address on election security, Canada wildfires causing air quality alerts across US cities, and a Cyclospora outbreak linked to Taco Bell lettuce dominate today's news. Research explores causal analysis of urban driving data, the misclassification of autistic writing as AI-generated, and accessible data interfaces for blind users.
news_summary: Trump delivered a primetime speech making unverified claims about election meddling, while Canada wildfires blanket major US cities with smoke. A Cyclospora outbreak traced to Taylor Farms lettuce sent to Taco Bell, and US strikes hit Iran as tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz.
papers_summary: Papers on arXiv cover exploratory causal analysis of urban driving data, benchmarking multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization, and the misclassification of autistic writing as AI-generated. Studies also address academic networking in precarious transitions and co-designing accessible tactile data interfaces.

en.brief: Trump's prime-time address on election security, Canada wildfires causing air quality alerts across US cities, and a Cyclospora outbreak linked to Taco Bell lettuce dominate today's news. Research explores causal analysis of urban driving data, the misclassification of autistic writing as AI-generated, and accessible data interfaces for blind users.
en.news_summary: Trump delivered a primetime speech making unverified claims about election meddling, while Canada wildfires blanket major US cities with smoke. A Cyclospora outbreak traced to Taylor Farms lettuce sent to Taco Bell, and US strikes hit Iran as tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz.
en.papers_summary: Papers on arXiv cover exploratory causal analysis of urban driving data, benchmarking multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization, and the misclassification of autistic writing as AI-generated. Studies also address academic networking in precarious transitions and co-designing accessible tactile data interfaces.

zh.brief: 今日重点：诺兰执导的《奥德赛》上映，白宫职员利用特朗普演讲内幕下注获利，皮尤调查显示全球对华好感度首次超越美国，霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级。研究方面关注AI文本检测对自闭症写作的误判及人机协作抛接球技术。
zh.news_summary: 中文新闻聚焦诺兰史诗电影《奥德赛》，白宫读稿机操作员涉内幕交易，皮尤报告称更多国家对中国好感胜于美国，以及霍尔木兹海峡替代路线探讨、LV诉茉莉奶白案、曼谷火灾反复发生、阿根廷因福克兰群岛横幅遭FIFA处罚。
zh.papers_summary: 英文研究揭示AI生成文本检测模型对自闭症写作的偏见，探索人机抛接球规划，并介绍游泳视频中叙事可视化的自动生成方法。

todays_image.caption: Like binoculars focusing on Friendship 7, the Cyclospora outbreak zoomed in on a hidden contamination in Taco Bell's lettuce.
todays_image.title: Binoculars, Friendship 7
